summary: Stale remote hero card + ws-token 503 spam after an untracked Pod death (ephemeral reaped host-side).
Root: _mode.active never cleared on untracked Pod death; feed can't emit offline (connected!==_last, feed never owned connect). Fix = server self-heal in /remote/comfy/status.

CODED: server self-heal in /remote/comfy/status (_isPodDead pure + _selfHealIfPodDead flips _mode.active=false + _starting=false on EXITED/TERMINATED/404-absent, never while in-flight). _lastPodAbsent set on getPod 404. shell.js feed force-emits offline on s.dead (bypasses connected!==_last guard + miss-debounce). Test tests/pod-self-heal-dead.test.cjs (6/6). No regression on runpod-remote-hardening (12/4 pre-existing, unchanged). Syntax-checked. NOT live-verified (needs a Pod that dies while connected).

Coded+unit-tested (6/6), committed 27b9204, doc'd. Still needs LIVE verify: a Pod that dies WHILE connected (ephemeral reaped / warm evicted) → footer self-heals to local + ws-token 503 spam stops. A clean Disconnect does NOT exercise this (that's MPI-240).

note: User decision: park in done; live untracked-Pod-death repro impractical.

summary: Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-239/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
